FreePats

Keep your ears open

Kalimba

Kalimba

Version 2019-05-31

This sound bank has been created from real instrument recordings, thanks to Xavimart (Javier), a musician that maintains a collection of musical instruments from many places around the world. He granted us access to his collection and helped with the performance and recording for all day long.

The kalimba was recorded on January 2019 by Xavimart, Gonzalo <humanogonzalo@gmail.com> and Roberto <roberto@zenvoid.org>, with two Zoom H1 portable recorders. Raw recordings were cropped, edited, and processed by Roberto, using free software programs.

Published under the terms of the Creative Commons CC0 1.0 public domain dedication.

DownloadFormatSizeComments
Sound bank SFZ WAV 10.3MiB Best quality. Round-robin layers
Sound bank SF2 3.7MiB
